title: Microbiology's WynnPack
description: A collection of mods that enhance the WynnCraft experience. Includes optimization, customization, immersion, and more.
body:
This modpack is intended for the WynnCraft Minecraft server. It has the WynnTils mod for extra functionality on the server as well as a bunch of optimization mods and mods that enhance the immersion. 

I have included a version of the resource pack Vanilla Tweaks. 
Link to [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)
